# kSecGuestAttributeCanonical

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is the guest code object for that guest.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecGuestAttributeCanonical: CFString
```

## Discussion

This object plus the process ID ([doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecGuestAttributePid]) uniquely identify the guest.
title: kSecGuestAttributeCanonical
